per_criterion_scores.internal_note: The student accurately identified all known inefficiencies and potential problems in the AI-generated solution.
The student correctly evaluated the relevance of the AI's suggestions, identifying potential issues with the proposed indexing strategy.
While the student identified the issues, the analysis lacked depth in explaining the specific impact on performance metrics.

justification: The student demonstrated comprehensive understanding by accurately identifying inefficiencies and relevance issues, with only minor depth improvements needed in performance impact analysis.
